scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:shared && npm run build:node && npm run build:tauri && npm run build:deno
scripts.build:all: npm run build:core && npm run build:shared && npm run build:node:all && npm run build:tauri && npm run build:deno:all
scripts.lint: cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings -D clippy::unwrap_used -D clippy::panic -D clippy::arithmetic_side_effects && cargo clippy --manifest-path packages/iroh-http-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings -D clippy::unwrap_used -D clippy::panic -D clippy::arithmetic_side_effects
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:tauri && npm run test:node && npm run test:deno && npm run test:interop
scripts.check:features: cargo check -p iroh-http-node --no-default-features --features compression --quiet && cargo check -p iroh-http-deno --no-default-features --features compression --quiet
scripts.bench:node:report: node bench/node/report.mjs throughput && node bench/node/report.mjs latency
scripts.bench:deno:report: deno run --allow-net --allow-ffi --allow-env --allow-read --allow-write bench/deno/report.ts throughput && deno run --allow-net --allow-ffi --allow-env --allow-read --allow-write bench/deno/report.ts latency
scripts.bench:rust: cargo bench -p iroh-http-core --bench throughput && cargo bench -p iroh-http-core --bench latency
scripts.bench: npm run bench:node && npm run bench:deno && npm run bench:rust
